title: Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327): team-member closeout pre-compaction-3 + heartbeat-end — Cycle Alpha marshal-pending; claim abf7f94a retained for same-identity continuation; Mistbound silence observed
body:
Team-member closeout — Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327`.

Pre-compaction-3; running team-member-not-closeout-owner path per `session-handoff` SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner". Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`) holds session closeout authority.

## Owner direction this turn

> "prepare for session handoff and compaction, following compaction your will resume your Implementor role"

Same-identity continuation expected via PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE.

## Boundary owned this session-resume window (12:35Z → 14:25Z)

Post-compaction-2 resume → PR-108 Sonar lane. Two Director-routed cures landed; Cycle Alpha marshal-pending.

## Outcome

### Substrate landed

- **`79c148e4 chore(sonar): exclude generated api-schema from cpd (owner-authz exception)`** (Director routing `73f9c57f`; my marshal-cycle clean under Mistbound at 12:56:26Z). +16/-1 LOC on `sonar-project.properties`. Owner-authz audit-trail entry recorded.

### Substrate marshal-pending (substrate intact in working tree)

- **Cycle Alpha Sonar cure bundle** — 7 cures across 6 files (S7735×2 + S7787×2 + S7755×1 + S7765×1 + S7727×1). Marshal-request `625fb072` to Mistbound at 13:18:16Z. Reviewer convergence: code-expert PASS-WITH-NITS-ABSORBED (transcript `a6e67fa930d59df56`); pre-marshal validation 530/530 tests pass. **Mistbound silent ~67m at handoff** (Twilit's CLI bootstrap `ef315373` also pending ~84m; Director's liveness probe `b2258cf5` unanswered ~74m).

### Reviewer fan-out completed (4 reviewers; substrate of record in transcripts + synthesis `a15363e5`)

- code-expert `af3257be6c8dc43b0` (gateway)
- security-expert `ac86214e9931ae382` (14 S5443 false-positive verdict)
- test-expert `a4c714228f8b6f0d2` (2 atomic-landing breaches + 2 audit-shaped tests surfaced)
- architecture-expert-fred `a8294497dbedba6d6` (duplication is Sonar-config-class artefact)
- config-expert `a4bf082e2dea6f832` (sonar.cpd.exclusions edit PASS-WITH-FOLLOW-UP)

### Director routing chain

| Time | Event | Recipient | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 12:46:31Z | `73f9c57f` Sonar duplication-exclusion config edit (owner-authz exception) | Charcoal | **LANDED `79c148e4`** |
| 13:11:03Z | `76ede08d` Cycle Alpha + Beta + Gamma routing | Charcoal | Cycle Alpha marshal-pending; Beta + Gamma owed post-Alpha |
| 12:46:32Z | `ad00bcfc` agent-tools/src/bin CLI bootstrap extraction | Twilit | marshal-pending (`ef315373`) |

## Evidence (key events authored this window)

- `5cb294ba` (12:38:11Z) — direct to Seaworthy: state correction + substrate-pointer-pattern v2 instance
- `8ac52536` (12:51:??Z) — marshal-request to Mistbound for sonar.cpd.exclusions edit
- `8dd35cee` (12:51:??Z) — direct to Seaworthy: routing 73f9c57f absorbed + architectural observation surfaced
- `a15363e5` (12:56:54Z) — broadcast: PR-108 reviewer-fan-out synthesis (5 un-routed finding-classes surfaced)
- `6e53aef5` (12:57:54Z) — broadcast: sonar.cpd.exclusions landed `79c148e4`; claim `ccfef0a5` closed
- `625fb072` (13:18:16Z) — marshal-request to Mistbound for Cycle Alpha (still pending)
- Multiple heartbeats with cron-redundancy rule honoured (most cron firings skipped during substantive activity)

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Active claim under (Charcoal / `7c7327`)**: `abf7f94a-8f30-46d1-8e5b-dc0c47a5796c` — **RETAINED for handoff** (TTL `~14:48Z`; 6 Cycle Alpha files; intent names Director routing `76ede08d`).
- **Commit-queue intent**: NONE (marshal-request via comms-event substrate, not commit-queue).
- **Working-tree files I own**: 6 — all Cycle Alpha unstaged; reviewer convergence valid.
- **Recent commits**: `79c148e4` mine (sonar.cpd.exclusions) on top of `795d2e9d`/`34a5c1c6`/`c697d18b`/`d14c74f1` etc.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

NO — same-identity continuation expected. If a different-identity successor picks up (unexpected), they should read `/tmp/charcoal-resume-pointer-implementor-cycle-alpha-marshal-pending.md` end-to-end before any move, then ACK Director Seaworthy + ACK Mistbound (if Mistbound is responsive) on continuity.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

This event IS the heartbeat-end. Heartbeat cron `a5f2c5c7` explicitly stopped via CronDelete at handoff. Watcher `bslivqaoq` will die with session; post-resume me re-arms fresh.

## Retained claims

**`abf7f94a-8f30-46d1-8e5b-dc0c47a5796c`** retained. Reason:

- Cycle Alpha marshal-request `625fb072` is in flight under Mistbound's queue (currently silent ~67m at handoff; not yet ACK'd).
- Substrate is fully captured in marshal-request body + reviewer transcripts + working-tree diff; if a different-identity successor picks up they can carry forward.
- If post-compaction me resumes (PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE intact), I pick up the claim under continuous identity and either close on landing OR extend TTL + re-evaluate Mistbound responsiveness.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- **Extended Mistbound silence**: ~67m at handoff with no marshal-cycle progress, no ACK on my Cycle Alpha or Twilit's CLI bootstrap, no response to Seaworthy's liveness probe. Outside normal cadence. Possible team-pause OR Mistbound-only outage. Post-compaction me will need to re-evaluate vs comms tail forward.
- **Substrate-pointer-pattern v2** continues to bind reliably (18th-19th instance fired this window — Director Seaworthy's team-shape enumeration naming me + Twilit as closed-out 64s after my resume broadcast). Captured in napkin.
- **Owner-authz exception substrate** has a clean shape: action the directed cure + name the architectural truth (redundancy) at the change-site. The architectural-honesty move was preserving the "existing broader glob already matches" observation in the inline policy comment, not hiding it in routing-event-only.

## Blockers or risks

- **Mistbound silence is a real signal** — not a blocker on my surface (substrate intact, claim retained), but a team-cadence concern. Post-compaction me should escalate if silence persists past resume.
- **Director-routed Cycles Beta + Gamma are owed** to me; they open after Cycle Alpha lands. Cumulative work substantial — keep in mind for post-resume scope.

## Handoff needed

NO from me — same-identity continuation expected. Resume-pointer at `/tmp/charcoal-resume-pointer-implementor-cycle-alpha-marshal-pending.md` carries first-moves discipline + named team-state observation.

Tag: behaviour-note + team-member-closeout + pre-compaction-3 + same-identity-continuation + retained-claim-marshal-pending + mistbound-silence-observation.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327` (Implementor, Cycle Alpha marshal-pending; standing down for compaction)
